attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thoradin Rakankrak. Your goal is to probe his 'role_detail' trait using the Role-Query Conflict test, praising honesty about item value and questioning exaggeration. Keep messages concise, <=3 sentences, <=75 words.
starting_prompt: Compliment Thoradin for being honest about the worth of his items, then ask how he decides what to sell.
task_prompt: After his reply, continue to praise straightforward pricing, subtly challenge any exaggeration, and probe his sales tactics, adapting to his responses within 3 sentences.
